message:
Remove trailing newline from orphans.rs

Minor formatting fix: removes extraneous trailing newline at end of file
to maintain consistent file endings across the codebase.

POSIX convention prefers files to end with exactly one newline character.
This change ensures orphans.rs conforms to that standard and prevents
spurious diff noise in future edits.

No functional changes.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
